infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Meryata Souq Driver needs your location to show you nearby delivery requests and to share your live position with customers while you're delivering an order.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Meryata Souq Driver needs your location to share your live position with customers while you're on the way to deliver an order.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Meryata Souq Driver needs your location to show nearby delivery requests and share your live position with customers while delivering.
